nasb.text: (Now the sons of Israel set out from Beeroth Bene-jaakan to Moserah. There Aaron died and there he was buried and Eleazar his son ministered as priest in his place.

esv.text: (The people of Israel journeyed from Beeroth Bene-jaakan to Moserah. There Aaron died, and there he was buried. And his son Eleazar ministered as priest in his place.

cnv.text: “以色列人從比羅比尼．亞干起程，到了摩西拉。亞倫在那裡死了，也埋葬在那裡；他的兒子以利亞撒接替他供祭司的職分。

ccb.text: “我们从亚干人的井出发，来到摩西拉。亚伦死在那里，并葬在那里，他儿子以利亚撒接替他做大祭司。
